note: Driver download manifest for GoldISO. Each entry is downloaded only when the target category directory contains zero .inf files. Supported archive types: .zip (Expand-Archive), .exe (silent extractor), .cab (expand.exe). extractArgs overrides the default '/s /e /f "<dest>"' for .exe packages.

drivers.description: Intel Ethernet drivers (I219-V, I225-V, I226-V) - update filename/url each driver release
Intel RST NVMe driver - required for Samsung 990 Pro on Intel 12th/13th gen
Intel MEI/CSME - Management Engine Interface driver
NVIDIA RTX 3060 Ti - NOTE: too large for offline injection; installed post-boot via pnputil. Leave this entry commented unless you need a specific offline NV driver.
Logitech G403 HERO - installed post-boot via pnputil. Offline injection not required.
